summary: The protagonist, "Alley Boss," successfully completes a challenging encounter with Lebron, earning a unique title and skill, and is subsequently tasked with a main scenario quest to investigate an undead infestation in Briggs. He soon discovers that the Black Skull Guild is actively searching for the owner of a specific item he recently acquired. To efficiently deal with this new threat, Alley Boss, advised by his friend Youngchan, publicly declares war on the Black Skull Guild through a provocative video, challenging them to character deletion bets. This public declaration infuriates the Black Skull Guildmaster, who recognizes Alley Boss as the one who has previously caused significant losses to his executives, setting the stage for a major conflict.
key_moments: The protagonist completes a challenge with Lebron, earning rewards and a new main scenario quest to investigate undead in Briggs.
He realizes the Black Skull Guild is hunting him for an item he bought, and, advised by a friend, publicly declares war on them through a viral video.
The Black Skull Guildmaster, recognizing "Alley Boss" as a recurring threat and the buyer of the 'Dwarf's Sword', responds by calling his executives to retaliate, initiating a guild war.
